subcodes.first_line: In this day the All-Merciful is manifest and Satan is resplendent. Well is it with the soul whom the promptings of Satan have not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز رحمن ظاهر و شیطان باهر طوبی از برای نفسیکه همزات شیطان او را از
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Satan; the Evil One, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
